$comment: CREDENTIALS / LOCAL-ONLY CONFIG TEMPLATE. This .example file is committed; the REAL file must be a gitignored copy. Copy it to perf.local.json (matched by the *.local gitignore rule already in this repo — the skill verifies with `git check-ignore` before using it). NEVER put secrets in scenarios.json or the results doc.
$comment_usage: This project currently needs NO login, so this file is unused. It exists so adding auth later is a config change, not a code change. If your real page needs login, fill in the fields below and reference this file from the skill's login step.

login.$comment_login: Set required: true and fill these in if your page is behind auth.
login.$comment_alt: Or, for token-based auth, set authHeaderName/authHeaderValue and the skill will inject it instead of driving a form.
